field_purpose: Reserve the unadjusted Sharpe input for a future Deflated Sharpe calculation.
notes: Future value must come from an approved validation report, not from this placeholder loop.

field_purpose: Reserve return skewness input needed by Deflated Sharpe-style adjustment.
notes: No returns were loaded or recomputed in this checkpoint.

field_purpose: Reserve return kurtosis input needed by Deflated Sharpe-style adjustment.
notes: No distribution statistic is inferred from existing summaries.

field_purpose: Reserve sample length or number of observations used by the future statistic.
notes: Future source must identify the exact validation sample and date scope.

field_purpose: Reserve total attempted-trial count before broad formula/model sweeps.
notes: The bootstrap ledger records known local report families but exact project-wide trial count is not yet computable.

field_purpose: Reserve correlation-adjusted or dependency-adjusted trial count for future Deflated Sharpe use.
notes: Effective trial count requires a future method for collapsing dependent formula/model attempts.

field_purpose: Reserve the adjusted score output field without computing it.
notes: Do not use this field for selection until a later approved calculation loop fills required inputs.

field_purpose: Block serious model/formula selection unless trial counts and validation controls exist.
notes: This checkpoint only reserves fields; it does not select, promote, demote, or score candidates.
